periods.name: Overnight

periods.name: Sunday

periods.name: Sunday Night
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 10pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 78. Heat index values as high as 101. South wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Monday
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11am and 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 92. Heat index values as high as 102. South wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
